note: All data extracted from OCR text of EFTA documents. No real names. EFTA pages verified against original PDFs.

victims.recruitment_method: Met another teenager at a NYC club who described topless massages for a rich man
unique_details: Living alone and supporting herself at 14
Paid $300 per massage, $300 per girl recruited
Recruited dozens of girls over approximately two years
Scheduled appointments through 'Leslie' (identified as Leslie Groff)
Described Epstein's residence: artwork in massage room, stuffed dog, library like 'Beauty and the Beast'
Told Epstein her true age (14)
Epstein said he did not like dark-skinned girls
Phone message from 646 area code found in trash pull from FL residence
victims.corroboration: Phone records, Individual-1 and Individual-2 interviews, residence description detail, pattern match with Victim-2

victims.recruitment_method: Recruited by a young girl at a party: could make $200 for a massage
unique_details: High school dropout, living away from home
Performed 10+ sexualized massages
Recruited approximately 20-30 additional girls, ages 15-20
Initially told to say she was 18; later stopped because Epstein preferred younger
Wore braces; 'it would have been obvious that she was very young'
Told she would be 'taken care of if she didn't say anything' when FL investigations became public
Full name and phone number on message pads from search of FL residence
Stated age 15 in 2007 FBI interview but now recalls being 14
victims.corroboration: Message pads from FL residence search, phone records with scheduling contact
victims.maxwell_trial_mapping: Possible Minor Victim-1 or Minor Victim-2

victims.recruitment_method: Recruited by a high school friend
unique_details: Visited Epstein's FL residence approximately 20 times
Paid $200 per visit
Told Epstein she was 17; SDNY believes she may have been 16 based on bank deposits
Deposits began June 2003 (weeks past 16th birthday)
Cash payments continued through January 2005
Epstein promised travel and modeling career after she turned 18
Phone records match Epstein's flight patterns (e.g., Sept 16 2004: calls then JFK->WPB flight)
Kept notebook of bank deposits from Epstein's cash payments
victims.corroboration: Bank deposit records, cell phone tolls matching flight logs
victims.mapping_evidence: Both Florida-based, both have phone records corroborating scheduling with co-conspirator, Minor Victim-3 key reference is EFTA02731039 p.8 (same VOL00012 series)

victims.recruitment_method: Brought by a friend to Epstein's house
unique_details: Paid $200 for a massage
Epstein attempted to touch her buttocks; she refused twice
Epstein said 'you're done' and put money on the table
Left upset, no subsequent contact
Later learned high school friends had also gone to Epstein's house
Recalled being 18 in FL state investigation; now recalls being 17

victims.location: Florida, New York, U.S. Virgin Islands
victims.role: Victim, recruiter, and person 'lent out' to multiple men
unique_details: Trained by Maxwell and Epstein in sex acts during a 'training period'
Epstein paid for apartment in Florida
Maxwell gave her a cellphone
Attended massage school paid for by Epstein
Used the term 'lent out' to describe being directed to have sex with other men
'Lent out so many times that she began using drugs'
'Cannot estimate how many times she was lent out'
Never paid by the other men
Recruited other minor girls for Epstein at Palm Beach
Directed to find 'young females who looked like the girl next door'
Epstein said 'the younger the better'
Told not to say anything if approached by press
victims.corroboration: Recruitment by Maxwell, abuse by Epstein, and recruiting of minors were corroborated. SDNY EXPLICITLY STATES they could NOT corroborate the 'lent out' accounts (Source: EFTA02731136).

cross_volume_appearances.type: FBI 302: lent out testimony re: Dubins
Prosecution planning: Dubin listed under 'Individuals Who Have Engaged in Massages with Epstein Girls'
